name: AI Roundtable - Clean Rolling Transcript 15s Test
description: Starts after Reka has answered, extracts a cleaned rolling transcript, switches by tab-title through the AI clients, submits each handoff, waits 15 seconds, and appends cleaned responses.

data.description: START AFTER Reka has answered. Click the Reka page, then run this. The workflow builds a cleaned rolling transcript and chains through the open AI tabs.
Initialize original prompt and roundtable transcript
Extract and clean latest Reka response; append to transcript
Switch to Perplexity tab by title
Paste cleaned roundtable transcript into Perplexity
Extract and clean latest Perplexity response; append to transcript
Switch to Copilot tab by title
Paste cleaned roundtable transcript into Copilot
Extract and clean latest Copilot response; append to transcript
Switch to Grok tab by title
Paste cleaned roundtable transcript into Grok
Extract and clean latest Grok response; append to transcript
Switch to Gemini tab by title
Paste cleaned roundtable transcript into Gemini
Extract and clean latest Gemini response; append to transcript
Switch to DeepSeek tab by title
Paste cleaned roundtable transcript into DeepSeek
Extract and clean latest DeepSeek response; append to transcript
Switch to Claude tab by title
Paste cleaned roundtable transcript into Claude
Extract and clean latest Claude response; append to transcript
Switch to ChatGPT tab by title
Paste cleaned roundtable transcript into ChatGPT
Extract and clean latest ChatGPT response; append to transcript
Copy final cleaned roundtable transcript to clipboard

data.message: Final cleaned roundtable transcript has been copied to the clipboard.
data.title: AI Roundtable complete
